revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ikarashino Shrine
| native_name = 伊加良志神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ikarashino Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ikarashino Shrine'''|伊加良志神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|ja|越後国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11636502|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province}}
** Series ordinal: 35
** P155: {{ill|Q135040460|ltq=Q135040460|qid=Q135040460|1=Wofuseno Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040462|ltq=Q135040462|qid=Q135040462|1=Iyahikono Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Echigo Province|lt=Echigo Province|be|Этыго (правінцыя)|ckb|پارێزگای ئێچیگۆ|cs|Provincie Ečigo|de|Provinz Echigo|en|Echigo Province|es|Provincia de Echigo|fa|ولایت اچیگو|fr|Province d'Echigo|gl|Provincia de Echigo|id|Provinsi Echigo|it|Echigo|ja|越後国|ko|에치고국|lt|Ečigo žemė|nl|Echigo (provincie)|pt|Província de Echigo|ru|Этиго (провинция)|simple|Echigo Province|sk|Ečigo (provincia)|sr|Провинција Ечиго|tr|Echigo (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Етіґо|zh_min_nan|Etigo-kok|zh_yue|越後國|zh|越後國|qid=Q666514|1=Echigo Province}}
* {{ill|Q11621281|ltq=Q11621281|qid=Q11621281|1=Kanbara district}}
* {{ill|Q817273|ltq=Q817273|qid=Q817273|1=Sanjō, Niigata}}

* 182453
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}
